title: Reset Device - Restore Defaults - Restore - No
scenario: Tapping "No" on the Restore Defaults confirmation popup closes the popup without resetting and keeps user on the Device Settings screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll down and tap 'Reset Device' or 'Restore Defaults' option
Observe the confirmation popup that appears
Verify popup displays message: 'Are you sure you want to restore to default settings?'
Verify popup displays two buttons: 'No' and 'Yes'
expected: The confirmation popup closes, the device is NOT reset to default settings, and the user remains on the same Device Settings screen.
